Write it to a temp file and compute the digest: python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt'. Lines 71-78 compare stored and computed hex digests and confirm 'Result: MATCH'. plan.md line 51 also states 'Compute current digest via python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt'.

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
